leadText: The Pink Scarf (Japanese: ピンクのバンダナ Pink Bandanna) is a type of held item introduced in Generation III. It increases the holder's Cuteness in a Pokémon Contest.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] This section is incomplete. Please feel free to edit this section to add missing information and complete it. Reason: Check how much exactly is raised by this item in all generations When held by a Pokémon, it raises its Cuteness in the primary round of a Pokémon Contest , the Visual Competition of a Super Contest , and the Introduction Round of a Contest Spectacular . In Generation III , it is raised by 20 points, up to a total of 255 points.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description R S E A hold item that raises Cute in Contests . FR LG An item to be held by a Pok é mon . It boosts the holding Pok é mon 's Cute condition in Contests . Colo XD An item brought over from a faraway place. D P Pt An item to be held by a Pokémon. It boosts the "Cute" aspect of the holder in a Contest. HG SS An item to be held by a Pokémon. It boosts the "Cute" aspect of the holder in a Contest in Sinnoh. B W B2 W2 An item to be held by a Pokémon. It boosts the Cute aspect of the holder in a Contest. X Y An item to be held by a Pokémon. During a Contest, it raises the Cute aspect of the Pokémon holding it. OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh LA An item to be held by a Pokémon. During a contest, it raises the Cute aspect of the Pokémon holding it. BD SP An item to be held by a Pokémon. During a Super Contest Show, it raises the Cuteness of the Pokémon holding it. S V When a Pokémon holds this during a contest, it looks even cuter than usual.
